work.summary: Provides strategic technical consulting and develops innovative solutions for scalable systems.
highlights: Founded Somastack to deliver high-impact technical solutions across industries.
Architected AI-driven automation frameworks for workflow optimization.
Developed open-source tooling and internal libraries to streamline DevOps processes.

work.summary: Designed and enhanced ServiceNow implementations, focusing on automation, security, and compliance.
highlights: Redesigned enterprise-level ServiceNow workflows to improve process efficiency.
Integrated real-time data pipelines for compliance reporting across multiple platforms.
Developed custom applications in ServiceNow to support identity verification and fraud detection.

work.summary: Led development and customization of ServiceNow solutions to enhance ITSM and business operations.
highlights: Built a high-availability ServiceNow instance supporting large-scale enterprise operations.
Led the migration of legacy ITSM systems into ServiceNow, reducing ticket resolution complexities.
Designed a scalable knowledge management portal within ServiceNow to improve internal documentation processes.
